name: Swiss Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cheese and sprinkle it with flour, salt, and pepper. Toss to coat thoroughly.
2. Heat the apple cider in a chafing dish or large skillet over low heat until it begins to bubble. Add 1/4 cup of the cheese mixture and stir vigorously until melted.
3. Continue adding cheese in small amounts, stirring vigorously after each addition, until all cheese is melted and thoroughly blended. Add a dash of Worcestershire sauce if desired.
4. Serve immediately with Sesame Ham Loaf, cut into 1-inch cubes, or with any good bread that has been cubed and toasted. Double the recipe as needed.
